question: If you're unsure about the particulars of HIPAA research requirements at your organization or have questions, you can usually consult with:
canonical_answer: No, they are not engaged because they are only informing the subjects and not consenting or performing any research procedures, or receiving or sharing any private, identifiable information.

appears_in.title: Citi Hipaa Training
appears_in.answer: An organizational IRB or Privacy Board, privacy official ("Privacy Officer"), or security official ("Security Officer"), depending on the issue.

appears_in.title: The Hipaa Minimum Necessary Standard Applies Citi
appears_in.answer: For all human subjects research that uses PHI without an authorization from the data subject, except for limited data sets.
